title: KingD3fault Overlay
description: This texture pack is an overlay of what KingD3fault ( The Crystal PvP / CPvP ⭐HT2⭐  USES.
body:
This pack was created to help improve people's skills in Crystal PvP and maybe even other pvp forms / gamemodes. This pack contains almost all the overlays and pack features/tweaks that kingd3fault ( HT2 IN CPVP ) Uses. 

This could even help people get a higher tier in crystal pvp, helping to raise their skill level.

Pack Made by me; (DrL3X2015)

Discord: DrL3X2015
